name: Parking Fine Payment
description: Sender wants to pay a fine or asks about payment options
checks: Is the sender asking about payment plans or hardship?

outcomes.hardship: Sender mentions financial difficulty, provide payment plan info

response_templates.payment_info: Thank you for your enquiry regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. Payment can be made online, by phone, or in person. The deadline is 28 days from issue.
response_templates.hardship: Thank you for your enquiry regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. Payment plans are available — please contact our office to discuss options.
